title: Golden Crisp Algerian Bread Flatbread
description: A mustardy, crisp, and comforting Algerian dish featuring bread flour and candy, perfect for a snack or light meal, and is egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Candy pieces
ingredients.notes: such as chopped peanut brittle or toffee

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the bread flour, granulated sugar, mustard seeds, and salt.
Gradually add the vegetable oil and water to the dry ingredients, stirring with a fork until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 6 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place the dough circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each flatbread.
Sprinkle the candy pieces evenly over the flatbreads.
Bake the flatbreads in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
